message:
fix: Security and correctness fixes from final review

- Fix command injection in cli/zigpy.ts: pass paths via sys.argv
  instead of interpolating into Python code string
- Fix stale build-phase2.sh reference in cli/zigpy.ts: use tsx
- Replace execSync string interpolation in build-phase2.ts which()
  with spawnSync to prevent command injection
- Add worker/src/*.zip to .gitignore (build artifacts)

files.patch:
@@ -22,8 +22,9 @@ worker/src/stdlib-fs.ts
 worker/src/stdlib-fs.mjs
 worker/src/stdlib-data.dat
 
-# WASM symlinks and extension artifacts in worker
+# WASM symlinks, zips, and extension artifacts in worker
 worker/src/*.wasm
+worker/src/*.zip
 worker/src/extensions/
 
 # Secrets
